# Description

<!--
Summarize the change, why it is needed, and which skills or repository paths are affected.
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat`: New skill, feature, or capability
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix or behavioral correction
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation update
- [ ] `refactor`: Internal restructuring without intended behavior change
- [ ] `test`: Validation or test update
- [ ] `build`: Dependency, packaging, or tooling change
- [ ] `ci`: Workflow or automation change
- [ ] `security`: Trust boundary or security guidance hardening
- [ ] `BREAKING CHANGE`: Intentional incompatible change
- [ ] `chore`: Other maintenance work

## Scope

- Skill(s):
- Paths touched:
- Activation or workflow affected:

## Related issues / discussions / resources

<!--
Examples:
- Closes #123
- Related to #456
- Follow-up to <doc page, design note, or issue>
-->

## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] I have read and followed [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](./.github/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`](./.github/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
- [ ] This pull request is scoped to one logical change.
- [ ] I ran `make format`.
- [ ] I ran `make lint`.
- [ ] I ran `make test`.
- [ ] I updated the root `README.md` if the skill catalog changed.
- [ ] I updated `SKILL.md`, references, and agent-specific metadata where needed.
- [ ] I considered security, activation safety, and backward compatibility.
